message:
test: add proptest suites for BloomFilter and SkipList

BloomFilter (17 properties, 200 cases each):
- No false negatives after arbitrary inserts
- Insert count tracking, clear resets all state
- Hash indices always in range, deterministic
- Estimated FP rate and fill ratio bounded [0,1]
- Union preserves all elements from both sets
- Serde roundtrip preserves membership
- CountingBloomFilter: no false negatives, insert/remove roundtrip,
  remove preserves others, multi-insert needs multi-remove (with
  saturation-aware assertion), clear resets, serde roundtrip,
  counter never exceeds 4-bit max (15)
- Optimal sizing always produces valid parameters

SkipList (15 properties, 200 cases each):
- Iteration always sorted, len equals unique keys
- Get returns latest value, remove makes key absent
- Insert overwrite preserves len
- Range returns only keys in bounds, matches iter filter
- Clear empties all state including current_level
- Deterministic with same seed
- Random ops vs BTreeMap reference model (full correctness oracle)
- Free slot reuse keeps arena bounded
- Stats consistency

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
